visual_analysis.description: A red soda can with white lettering, identified as Coca-Cola.
A green soda can with white lettering, identified as Sprite.
A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located between the two soda cans.
A white can with some graphics, partially visible behind the red soda can.
A brown paper bag standing in the background behind the drinks.

action_plan.explanation: Picking the first requested item, the coke can, which is unobstructed.
Picking the second requested item, the sprite can, which is also unobstructed.
